name: Sort Characters by Frequency
statement:
You are given a string s. Return the array of unique characters, sorted by highest to lowest occurring characters.


If two or more characters have same frequency then arrange them in alphabetic order.
constraints:
• 1 <= s.length <= 105
  • s consist of only lowercase English characters.

examples.explanation: The occurrences of each character are as shown below : e --> 2 r --> 1 t --> 1. The r and t have same occurrences , so we arrange them by alphabetic order.
The occurrences of each character are as shown below : a --> 4 j --> 2 r --> 1
